articles.title: Katy Perry to drop NFT collection later this year
articles.description: Katy Perry announced Wednesday that she’s dropping an NFT collection in Q4 and that she bought a minority stake in a blockchain tech company.

articles.title: Here's why pro traders expect further downside from Ethereum price
articles.description: Ethereum's EIP-1559 upgrade is fast approaching, but derivatives data shows traders are less than optimistic about ETH's short-term prospects.

articles.title: Ripple Hires Former Mastercard Exec to Expand Its XRP-Powered Solution RippleNet
articles.description: Fintech giant Ripple has hired former Mastercard executive Sendi Young as Managing Director of its European operations in a bid to expand Ripple’s global financial network technology RippleNet, which uses the XRP token for its On-Demand Liquidity (ODL) solution. In a blog post, Ripple detailed that Sendi has over fifteen years of experience in fintech, […]

articles.title: Veteran Crypto Trader Says One ‘Extremely Bullish’ Altcoin Will Significantly Outperform Ethereum This Year
articles.description: A veteran crypto trader and influencer is singling out one mid-cap altcoin that he says will significantly outperform Ethereum this year. articles.title: CoinMarketCap launches Ethereum token swaps powered by Uniswap
articles.description: CoinMarketCap has launched a token swap feature via integration with Uniswap, and has hinted at supporting additional DEXs and networks in the future.
